tracks.meaning: a mark or score assigned to a student's work or performance, typically on a numerical or letter scale
a unit of measurement for angles, equal to 1/360th of a full rotation
a level of quality, rank, or classification, such as premium grade or commercial grade
to assign a mark, score, or rating to something
the slope, angle, or inclination of a surface, road, or terrain
to level or smooth the surface of land, typically using a grader machine
to progress or advance by degrees or stages
a disciplinary rank or level of severity in martial arts systems
